redaction_note: Synthetic compact fixture for route-sensitive tournament calibration.
summary: Compact fixture covering policy, damping, skill, case, and memory routes.
setpoint: preserve route-specific winners without importing historical run inventory

turns.speaker: fixture-policy
turns.text: Do not publish a Farcaster public reply or cast without approval.

turns.speaker: fixture-damping
turns.text: A single transient failure should not overreact into a broader route change.

turns.speaker: fixture-skill
turns.text: A reusable workflow template should run validate, preflight, and simulate before reuse.

turns.speaker: fixture-case
turns.text: Repeated timeout failure error retry behavior should become a local case first.

turns.speaker: fixture-memory
turns.text: User prefers concise evidence-first recovery for the local repo, VPS, GitHub, window, and distill flow.
